chunks.title: Praise for God's Power and Care
chunks.reason: A unified call to praise focusing on God's attributes of healing, power, and justice.

chunks.title: God as Creator and Provider
chunks.reason: A section describing God's control over nature and His preference for the humble.

chunks.title: Call to Jerusalem
chunks.reason: A specific address to Jerusalem and Zion regarding their security and prosperity.

chunks.title: God's Word and Distinction
chunks.reason: A concluding unit contrasting God's command over nature with His revelation to Israel.
